nodes.label: Universal state representation for the Smart Campus Orchestration Graph.
nodes.norm_label: universal state representation for the smart campus orchestration graph.

nodes.label: Smart Campus Agent System
nodes.rationale: Agentic AI-driven campus management framework that replaces rigid, reactive, manually-supervised legacy systems with intelligent real-time monitoring and autonomous collaborative agents to reduce timetable conflicts and operational costs.

nodes.label: LangGraph Multi-Agent Orchestration
nodes.rationale: A compiled LangGraph StateGraph routes natural-language queries to specialist agent nodes and delegates tasks; entry point is always the router node and all nodes converge on END.

nodes.label: Router Node (Intent Classification)
nodes.rationale: Classifies user intent (facility / scheduling / general) via keyword detection and sets current_action to drive conditional routing.

nodes.label: Scheduler Agent Node
nodes.rationale: Handles timetable conflicts and automated task scheduling when the router classifies scheduling/task intent.

nodes.label: Facility Agent Node
nodes.rationale: Manages room bookings and facility reservations when the router classifies room-booking intent.

nodes.label: General Fallback Node
nodes.rationale: Default node for general campus FAQ / info queries that do not match scheduling or facility intent.

nodes.label: AgentState (Centralized State)
nodes.rationale: Universal state (messages, steps, params, current_action, final_response) that every node reads and updates as the query flows through the graph.

nodes.label: POST /api/agent/chat Contract
nodes.rationale: Main REST endpoint accepting {message} and returning ChatResponse (agent, response, steps, params); front-end integration point for the orchestration workflow.

nodes.label: Next.js Campus Dashboard
nodes.rationale: Single-page Next.js/Tailwind dashboard with overview/chat/scheduler/facilities tabs; polls /api/health and falls back to demo mock mode when backend is unreachable.

nodes.label: FastAPI Backend Service
nodes.rationale: Python FastAPI server hosting REST endpoints and WebSockets that compiles and runs the LangGraph orchestration workflow.
